posts.author: yogeshkhadse
posts.community: CONNPLEX CINEMA - A RETAILER WITH NEAR INFINITE RoCE
posts.text: afaqs! Inside PVR INOX’s plan to turn multiplexes into live entertainment hubs Nayana Bijli, Lead, Distribution and Licensing, PVR INOX Limited, shares how the ‘Live on Stage’ initiative is opening cinema doors for local artistes to connect with wider audiences.
